task_name: Add Approved Human Review Adapter Fixture
goal: Add a local fixture proving require_human_review can proceed only after explicit human approval in the mock Builder Adapter.
claims: An approved require_human_review fixture returns a completed mock adapter output.
The fixture still keeps decision_ready false and requires_human_gate true.
The local fixture test script now checks blocked and approved human-review paths.
assumptions: No adapter implementation change is required.
Approved human review in the mock adapter still does not mean live Builder integration exists.
No package or docs edit is required.
dod: Approved human-review output has status completed and a mock builder_task_id.
Approved human-review output has decision_ready false and requires_human_gate true.
stop_conditions: Real Builder endpoint or network call becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-008 added guard fixtures and recommended either a mock-backed endpoint boundary or a CLI test for approved require_human_review after human approval. Network calls remain out of scope.
